text:
Created attachment 228729
nginx-1.20.1_4,2.log

nginx build is broken for the RTMP module; fails with error:

/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/nginx/work/nginx-rtmp-module-2d4613c/ngx_rtmp_handshake.c:107:29: error: variable has incomplete type 'HMAC_CTX' (aka 'struct hmac_ctx_st')

Full log attached.
